summary: Completed testing of Fill in the Blank format and Practice Insights features. All 7 features verified as WORKING: (1) Fill in the Blank uses SINGLE WORD answers, (2) Hints show 'Starts with X, N letters' format, (3) Sentences are proper with _____ placeholder, (4) Practice Insights tab has assignment dropdown selector, (5) Insights shows participant/session/answers/accuracy counts, (6) Insights shows 'Game Modes Used' breakdown, (7) Insights shows 'Most Challenging Questions' with miss counts.
